trivia: Gulfstream's super-midsize is built by Israel Aerospace Industries in Tel Aviv, then finished in Dallas: a transatlantic-capable jet with big-Gulfstream DNA in a smaller body.
The only Gulfstream not built in Savannah, which makes its manufacturing story as interesting as its range.
funFacts: Assembled by IAI in Israel under Gulfstream's flag.
Can cross the Atlantic westbound against the winds.
